case_title: ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION VS HITCHCOCK, ANNELI

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HITCHCOCK, ANNELI
